metadata.source: First audit pass: corrected flags and notes

records.edibility_detail: Edible for some people, but causes gastrointestinal upset in others. Treat as conditionally edible and use caution because of both sensitivity and look-alike issues.
Eat only when the interior is pure white with no darkening and no developing cap or gill structure. This is a harvest-stage rule, not a special preparation rule.
Only edible while the interior is pure white. Discard once yellowing, browning, or softening begins. This is a harvest-stage rule, not a special preparation rule.
